ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Dismissal By Contestant Dana Pitts
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Probate Litigation
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Contestant Dana Pitts
Off Calendar Mar-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Paul Kelly, Esq., appeared for respondent & moving party: Latonya McCullum
No other appearance

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Respondents' Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted as Contestant is ordered to respond within 20 days of notice of this order. Respondent's request for sanctions is denied. Late opposition has been considered. The inadequate notice and service of this motion has been waived by that late opposition. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Stein for Dana Pitts. Phyllis Berenson for Barbara DeVries. Paul Kelly for the Respondent.

Mr. Stein informed the court that service was made on his client and that the proof of service had been filed. In addition, he stated that his client was not providing any tools to proceed with litigation and that he was unable to state the other reasons for the request to be relieved. The Court stated that there were no matters pending when the motion was filed but that there was a discovery matter now on calendar. The Court denied the motion without prejudice directing Mr. Stein to California Rule of Court 3.1632 and CCP 284. Mr. Stein can refile.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M .Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Letter Of Administration With Will Annexed
Off Calendar Sep-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Phyllis Berenson appearing for and with special administrator Barbara DeVries. No one is here for Dana Pitts. Court took that matter off calendar. Counsel has not heard from Mr. Stein. She informed the Court that the beneficiary has retained litigation counsel to defend the Will Contest. Mr. Stein has argued that Ms. DeVries is not entitled to defend the Will. Court is admitting the will and appointing Ms. DeVries as the administrator with will annexed. Bond is fixed in the amount of $150,000.00. Order Signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: S. Mann.
